So, we need to find a time window when Anthony wasn't doing any of these other activities and the bookstore was open. So option B (8am-11am) is out. Then, after 11am, what's happening? The next known activity is from 1pm to 9pm at the theater. So between 11am and 1pm, Anthony isn't accounted for.
